base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_golden_cross — a pickup_item (currency) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Cross — gold/silver variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cross — gold/silver variants; used at final altar to seal Dracula
